title: cynosurus echinatus var. hystrix
intro: Cynosurus echinatus var. hystrix, also known as the prickly dog's tail, is a variety of the grass species Cynosurus echinatus. This plant is characterized by its long, spiny stems and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Cynosurus echinatus var. hystrix include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene compounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing.
